# Structure Standards

**Lifespan: PERMANENT — NEVER DELETE**

## Folder Structure

```text
project/
├── src/
│   ├── components/      # UI components
│   ├── pages/          # Page components
│   ├── api/            # API clients
│   ├── hooks/          # Custom hooks
│   ├── utils/          # Utilities
│   └── store/          # State management
├── tests/              # Test files
├── docs/               # Documentation
└── [config files]
```

- [principle 1]
- [principle 2]

---

*Update when architecture changes. Log the reason for changes.*
